mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rides (rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare) VALUES ( #{riderId}::uuid, #{driverId}::uuid NULL, #{pickupLat}, #{pickupLng}, #{dropoffLat}, #{dropoffLng}, #{statusTypeId}, #{estimatedFare} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE rides SET status_type_id = #{statusTypeId}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
UPDATE rides SET driver_id = #{driverId}::uuidNULL, status_type_id = #{statusTypeId}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
UPDATE rides SET final_fare = #{finalFare}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL

UPDATE rides SET status_type_id = #{statusTypeId}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, final_fare = #{finalFare}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT dl.driver_id, dl.latitude, dl.longitude, dl.created_at FROM driver_locations dl INNER JOIN ( SELECT driver_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM driver_locations WHERE delete_info IS NULL GROUP BY driver_id ) latest ON dl.driver_id = latest.driver_id AND dl.created_at = latest.max_created INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = dl.driver_id AND u.driver_status_type_id = 4 AND u.delete_info IS NULL WHERE dl.delete_info IS NULL AND (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{pickupLat})) * cos(radians(dl.latitude)) * cos(radians(dl.longitude) - radians(#{pickupLng})) + sin(radians(#{pickupLat})) * sin(radians(dl.latitude)) )) <= #{radiusKm}
AND dl.driver_id NOT IN
#{did}::uuid
ORDER BY (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{pickupLat})) * cos(radians(dl.latitude)) * cos(radians(dl.longitude) - radians(#{pickupLng})) + sin(radians(#{pickupLat})) * sin(radians(dl.latitude)) )) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE driver_id = #{driverId}::uuid AND status_type_id = 8 AND delete_info IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE rider_id = #{riderId}::uuid AND status_type_id IN (7, 8, 9, 10) AND delete_info IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
